name: ngx-translatorex
description: Angular ngx-translate toolkit: one-shortcut extraction, multi-language sync, missing-key diagnostics, go-to-definition, key rename/delete, and hard-coded string detection.

commands.title: ngx-translatorex: Set Main i18n json file
ngx-translatorex: Set Path to i18n folder
ngx-translatorex: Add new translation
commands.enablement: editorLangId == typescript && editorHasSelection || editorLangId == html && editorHasSelection

commands.title: ngx-translatorex: Sort Main i18n json file
ngx-translatorex: Rename i18n key across all languages
ngx-translatorex: Delete i18n key across all languages
ngx-translatorex: Scan workspace for hard-coded strings
ngx-translatorex: Extract all hard-coded strings in this template

ngx-translatorex.mode.description: Mode: can be key or scope

ngx-translatorex.placeholder.description: Placeholder written into secondary language files for a new key until it is translated. Also used to flag untranslated keys in the translation report.

ngx-translatorex.diagnostics.description: Report keys used with the translate pipe (HTML) or TranslateService (TypeScript) that are missing from the i18n files as warnings.

ngx-translatorex.syncLanguages.description: When adding a new key, also write a placeholder into every other language file so the key exists in all languages.

ngx-translatorex.detectHardcodedStrings.description: Experimental: flag hard-coded (untranslated) user-facing strings in HTML templates as hints, with quick fixes to extract or ignore them. Opt-in.

ngx-translatorex.hardcodedStringsMinLeng.description: Minimum length of a hard-coded string to flag. Shorter strings are ignored.

ngx-translatorex.hardcodedStringsIgnore.description: Strings to never flag as hard-coded. Supports '*' wildcards (e.g. 'OK', '© *').

ngx-translatorex.autoTranslateOnCreate.description: When a new key is added, immediately translate it into the other languages with your language model instead of leaving placeholders. Requires a language model provider (e.g. GitHub Copilot). Opt-in.

ngx-translatorex.sortKeysOnSave.description: Alphabetically sort each i18n file (recursively) whenever the extension writes to it.

ngx-translatorex.inlineTranslations.description: Show each translation key's main-language value inline (greyed) after the key in templates and components.

ngx-translatorex.translationCoverageStat.description: Show per-language translation coverage (e.g. 'pl 87% · fr 60%') in the status bar, click-through to the report.

ngx-translatorex.keyUsageCodeLens.description: Show a 'used N×' CodeLens above each key in the i18n JSON files, click-through to its usages.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_scanHardcodedStrings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scan Angular HTML templates for hard-coded (untranslated) user-facing strings. Returns a JSON array of { file, line, text, category, confidence } — category is 'text' (a text node) or 'attribute'; confidence is 'high'/'low'. Filter on these to skip likely false positives without opening files. Call this first to discover what needs extracting. Optionally pass a single workspace-relative .html file to scan only that file.

file.description: Optional workspace-relative path to a single .html template. Omit to scan the whole workspace.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_extractString
languageModelTools.displayName: Extract hard-coded string to i18n key
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Extract a hard-coded string from a template into an i18n key: replaces every hard-coded occurrence of the exact text in the file with a `{{ 'key' | translate }}` pipe and writes the key (with the text as its main-language value) across all language files. Choose a meaningful, nested key name (e.g. 'page.title', 'actions.save'). Returns the key and how many occurrences were replaced; when the text is not found exactly, returns partial:true with the containing node if your text is only a fragment of a larger (e.g. interpolated) node — extract that whole node instead.

text.description: The exact hard-coded text to extract, as returned by the scan tool.

key.description: The dotted i18n key to create, e.g. 'page.title'.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_extractStrings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Extract MANY hard-coded strings into i18n keys in ONE call (batch — prefer this over extractString when you have more than one). For each item, replaces every occurrence of the exact text with a `{{ 'key' | translate }}` pipe and adds the key across all language files. Omit an item's `files` to extract that text from EVERY template (common for shared buttons/labels). Choose meaningful, nested keys (e.g. 'checkout.summary.total'); reuse the same key for identical text. Returns per item how many occurrences were replaced and in which files.

items.description: Extractions to perform in this batch. Group everything you found into a single call.

text.description: The exact hard-coded text to extract, as returned by the scan tool.

key.description: The dotted i18n key to create, e.g. 'page.title'. Reuse for identical text.

files.description: Optional workspace-relative .html paths; omit to extract this text from every template.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_listMissingTranslations
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List i18n keys that are missing or still hold the untranslated placeholder, with their main-language source text. Call with summary:true (default) FIRST — it returns per-language and per-prefix counts only (no source blobs), safe on large projects; then pull details with summary:false plus prefix/language/limit/offset. Never request the full unprefixed detail on a large project — it can overflow the context window. Then translate and call setTranslations once with all the results (preferred).

summary.description: Default true: return counts + per-prefix histogram only. Set false for key/source detail (use with prefix/limit).

prefix.description: Only keys equal to or nested under this dotted prefix, e.g. 'checkout'.

limit.description: Detail mode: max entries to return (default 100).

offset.description: Detail mode: entries to skip, for pagination.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_setTranslation
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Write a single translation into one language file: sets the given key to the given value in <language>.json. Preserve any {{ interpolation }} tokens from the source text exactly. Prefer setTranslations when writing more than one. Returns whether the write succeeded.

language.description: Target language code / file name without extension, e.g. 'pl'.

key.description: The dotted i18n key to write.

value.description: The translated value, keeping any {{ params }} intact.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_setTranslations
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Write many translations at once, across one or more language files, in a single operation. Prefer this over setTranslation when filling multiple keys (e.g. after listMissingTranslations). Preserve any {{ interpolation }} tokens exactly — a value that drops a param present in the source is rejected and reported as skipped. Pass dryRun:true to preview the written/skipped counts without writing. Returns how many entries were written and skipped.

language.description: Language code / file name without extension, e.g. 'pl'.

value.description: The translated value, keeping any {{ params }} intact.

dryRun.description: Preview only: validate and count without writing files.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_seedMissingTranslations
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fill secondary-language files with a starting value for every key they still lack — the placeholder ([TODO]) or a copy of the main-language source (copySource:true). Optional groundwork; NOT required for translating, since setTranslations creates missing keys directly. Pass dryRun:true to preview. Returns how many keys were seeded per language.

copySource.description: Seed with the main-language source text instead of the [TODO] placeholder.

language.description: Only seed this secondary language; omit for all.

dryRun.description: Preview only: count what would be seeded without writing.

languageModelTools.name: ngx-translatorex_listUndefinedKeys
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List keys referenced with the translate pipe (HTML) or TranslateService (TypeScript) that do not exist in any i18n file — dead references. Returns { file, line, key }. Use it to find keys the code uses but no translation defines, then create them (setTranslations) or fix the reference.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: npm run clean && npm run compile && mocha "out/test/unit/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run clean && npm run compile && node ./out/test/runTest.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
